message:
Update dashboard navigation with pattern and history view shortcuts

Navigation Enhancements:
- Add OnPatterns callback field to Model struct for navigating to pattern
  management view
- Add OnHistory callback field to Model struct for navigating to history
  browser view

Keybinding Changes:
- 'm' key: Navigate to pattern management view (calls OnPatterns callback)
- 'h' key: Navigate to history browser view (calls OnHistory callback)
  Falls back to left focus movement if OnHistory callback is not set
- 'left' key: Now only moves focus left (previously 'h' was an alias)
- Removed 'h' as alias for left movement to avoid conflict with history

Footer Update:
- Update keybinding hints in footer to show new shortcuts:
  "[tab] focus  [↑/↓] navigate  [m] patterns  [h] history  [q] quit"

Rationale:
The dashboard is the central hub of the TUI. Users need quick access to:
- Pattern management ('m') for reviewing pattern change suggestions
- History browser ('h') for searching past requests

The 'h' key was chosen for history as it's intuitive (h=history) and commonly
used in other applications. The pattern view uses 'm' for "manage patterns"
since 'p' might be confused with "pending" requests.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
